benchmarks.title: Fast enough.
benchmarks.subtitle: Autumn is built on ASGI and uses modern Python features to ensure your app stays snappy.

0.title: Code that feels like home
0.subtitle: Autumn leverages Python's type hints and decorators to create a declarative, clean API.

1.title: Dependency Injection done right
1.subtitle: No magic globals. Clear dependencies, explicit wiring, predictable behavior.

marketing.title: Why Autumn?
marketing.subtitle: We love the existing ecosystem, but we wanted something opinionated about code structure.

api.title: Minimal API
api.description: Decorator-based routing with clean, intuitive controllers

di.title: Dependency Injection
di.description: Simple and explicit dependency injection system

configuration.title: Configuration Classes
configuration.description: Typed configuration via JSON, YAML, and environment variables

hooks.title: Hooks & Middlewares
hooks.description: Flexible lifecycle hooks and route-level middleware

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI docs and dependency graph

0.title: Not FastAPI
0.description: Like FastAPI, but with a built-in dependency injection system that keeps your architecture clean.

1.title: Not Flask
1.description: Everything Flask gives you, plus the tools you usually end up adding yourself.

2.title: Not Django
2.description: All the power, none of the 47 settings files.
